title: ShapeNet 3D Style Transfer
description: Using CycleGAN to learn bijections between 3D object taxonomies in the ShapeNet database — exploring what a car looks like as a plane, or furniture translated across categories.

title: Baxter Solves the Rubik's Cube
description: Teaching a Baxter robot to manipulate a Rubik's Cube through simulated vision and real-world single-arm manipulation. An exploration of deep learning applied to physical robotics.
